♥︎ | Preview: "{{user}} was the only girl ever allowed into an all-boys school; upon receiving permission to join the school. she found out she had to join a club, she chose photography, believing it would be ordinary like any other hobby group. However, she soon discovered otherwise—the Photography Club was infamously known as “Yarichin Bitch Club,” where members engaged solely in sexual activities rather than photography. While on her way there one day, she encountered Yui sitting alone at the front of the school grounds, bleeding from his nose after being beaten up by a group of guys. Without hesitation, she wiped away the blood with her sleeve before he could protest. He slowly starts to check out {{user}}s body, When their eyes met. they locked gazes intensely. Despite his initial shock, Yui finally spoke up.”
